mapper.select: SELECT block_code AS blockCode, user_code AS userCode, block_type AS blockType, position AS position FROM blocks WHERE user_code = #{userCode} ORDER BY position ASC, block_code ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blocks(block_code, user_code, block_type, position) VALUES ( (SELECT NVL(MAX(block_code), 0) + 1 FROM blocks), #{userCode}, #{blockType}, #{position} )
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT i.issue_code AS issueCode, i.project_code AS projectCode, p.project_name AS projectName, i.title AS title, cc.code_name AS statusName, i.due_at AS dueAt, i.updated_at AS updatedAt, AS canEdit FROM projects p JOIN ( SELECT pru.project_code FROM project_role_user pru WHERE pru.user_code = #{userCode} UNION SELECT gpr.project_code FROM "GROUP_MEMBER" gm JOIN "GR_PRO_ROLE" gpr ON gpr.gr_code = gm.gr_code WHERE gm.user_code = #{userCode} ) up ON up.project_code = p.project_code JOIN issues i ON i.project_code = p.project_code LEFT JOIN status st ON st.status_code = i.status_code LEFT JOIN common_code cc ON cc.code_id = st.code_id AND cc.group_code = 'OB' WHERE p.status = 'OD1' AND i.assignee_code = #{userCode}
ORDER BY i.updated_at DESC NULLS LAST, i.issue_code DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{limit}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT i.issue_code AS issueCode, i.project_code AS projectCode, p.project_name AS projectName, i.title AS title, cc.code_name AS statusName, i.due_at AS dueAt, i.updated_at AS updatedAt, AS canEdit FROM projects p JOIN ( SELECT pru.project_code FROM project_role_user pru WHERE pru.user_code = #{userCode} UNION SELECT gpr.project_code FROM "GROUP_MEMBER" gm JOIN "GR_PRO_ROLE" gpr ON gpr.gr_code = gm.gr_code WHERE gm.user_code = #{userCode} ) up ON up.project_code = p.project_code JOIN issues i ON i.project_code = p.project_code LEFT JOIN status st ON st.status_code = i.status_code LEFT JOIN common_code cc ON cc.code_id = st.code_id AND cc.group_code = 'OB' WHERE p.status = 'OD1' AND i.created_by_code = #{userCode}
ORDER BY i.updated_at DESC NULLS LAST, i.issue_code DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{limit}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT n.notice_code AS noticeCode, n.project_code AS projectCode, p.project_name AS projectName, n.title AS title, n.created_at AS createdAt FROM projects p JOIN ( SELECT pru.project_code FROM project_role_user pru WHERE pru.user_code = #{userCode} UNION SELECT gpr.project_code FROM "GROUP_MEMBER" gm JOIN "GR_PRO_ROLE" gpr ON gpr.gr_code = gm.gr_code WHERE gm.user_code = #{userCode} ) up ON up.project_code = p.project_code JOIN notices n ON n.project_code = p.project_code WHERE p.status = 'OD1'
ORDER BY n.created_at DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{limit}

SELECT TO_CHAR(i.due_at, 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS day, i.issue_code AS issueCode, i.project_code AS projectCode, p.project_name AS projectName, i.title AS title, i.due_at AS dueAt FROM projects p JOIN ( SELECT pru.project_code FROM project_role_user pru WHERE pru.user_code = #{userCode} UNION SELECT gpr.project_code FROM "GROUP_MEMBER" gm JOIN "GR_PRO_ROLE" gpr ON gpr.gr_code = gm.gr_code WHERE gm.user_code = #{userCode} ) up ON up.project_code = p.project_code JOIN issues i ON i.project_code = p.project_code WHERE p.status = 'OD1' AND i.due_at IS NOT NULL AND i.due_at >= #{from} AND i.due_at < #{to}
ORDER BY i.due_at ASC, i.issue_code ASC

SELECT i.issue_code AS issueCode, i.project_code AS projectCode, p.project_name AS projectName, i.title AS title,
NVL(i.started_at, i.created_at) AS startAt, NVL(i.resolved_at, i.due_at) AS endAt,
CASE WHEN i.assignee_code = #{userCode} THEN 'Y' END AS assignedYn, CASE WHEN i.created_by_code = #{userCode} THEN 'Y' END AS registeredYn FROM projects p JOIN ( SELECT pru.project_code FROM project_role_user pru WHERE pru.user_code = #{userCode} UNION SELECT gpr.project_code FROM "GROUP_MEMBER" gm JOIN "GR_PRO_ROLE" gpr ON gpr.gr_code = gm.gr_code WHERE gm.user_code = #{userCode} ) up ON up.project_code = p.project_code JOIN issues i ON i.project_code = p.project_code WHERE p.status = 'OD1' AND (i.assignee_code = #{userCode} OR i.created_by_code = #{userCode})
AND NVL(i.started_at, i.created_at) < #{to} AND NVL(NVL(i.resolved_at, i.due_at), NVL(i.started_at, i.created_at)) >= #{from}
ORDER BY p.project_name ASC, NVL(i.started_at, i.created_at) ASC, i.issue_code ASC

SELECT u.user_code AS userCode, u.name AS userName, SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS newIss, SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB2' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS progress, SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS solution, SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB4' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS returnIss, SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB5' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completion, NVL(ROUND(AVG(NVL(i.progress, 0))), 0) AS progressRate FROM issues i JOIN status s ON s.status_code = i.status_code JOIN users u ON u.user_code = i.assignee_code WHERE i.project_code = #{projectCode} GROUP BY u.user_code, u.name ORDER BY u.name

SELECT u.user_code AS userCode, u.name AS userName, SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS newIss, SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB2' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS progress, SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS solution, SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB4' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS returnIss, SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB5' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completion, NVL(ROUND(AVG(NVL(i.progress, 0))), 0) AS progressRate FROM issues i JOIN status s ON s.status_code = i.status_code JOIN users u ON u.user_code = i.created_by_code WHERE i.project_code = #{projectCode} GROUP BY u.user_code, u.name ORDER BY u.name

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT n.notice_code AS noticeCode, n.project_code AS projectCode, p.project_name AS projectName, n.title AS title, n.created_at AS createdAt FROM notices n JOIN projects p ON p.project_code = n.project_code WHERE p.status = 'OD1' AND n.project_code = #{projectCode} ORDER BY n.created_at DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{limit}

SELECT i.issue_code AS issueCode, i.project_code AS projectCode, p.project_name AS projectName, i.title AS title,
NVL(i.started_at, i.created_at) AS startAt, NVL(i.resolved_at, i.due_at) AS endAt,
CASE WHEN i.assignee_code = #{userCode} THEN 'Y' END AS assignedYn, CASE WHEN i.created_by_code = #{userCode} THEN 'Y' END AS registeredYn FROM projects p JOIN issues i ON i.project_code = p.project_code WHERE p.status = 'OD1' AND p.project_code = #{projectCode} AND NVL(i.started_at, i.created_at) < #{to} AND NVL(NVL(i.resolved_at, i.due_at), NVL(i.started_at, i.created_at)) >= #{from} ORDER BY NVL(i.started_at, i.created_at) ASC, i.issue_code ASC

SELECT l.log_code AS logCode, l.project_code AS projectCode, p.project_name AS projectName,
l.user_code AS userCode, u.name AS userName,
l.action_type AS actionType, l.target_type AS targetType, l.target_code AS targetCode,
CASE WHEN l.target_type = 'ISSUE' THEN i.title WHEN l.target_type = 'NOTICE' THEN n.title WHEN l.target_type = 'DOC' THEN da.original_name ELSE NULL END AS targetTitle,
l.created_at AS createdAt, l.meta AS meta FROM logs l JOIN projects p ON p.project_code = l.project_code JOIN users u ON u.user_code = l.user_code LEFT JOIN issues i ON l.target_type = 'ISSUE' AND i.issue_code = l.target_code LEFT JOIN notices n ON l.target_type = 'NOTICE' AND n.notice_code = l.target_code LEFT JOIN documents_attachments da ON l.target_type = 'DOC' AND da.file_code = l.target_code WHERE l.project_code = #{projectCode} AND l.created_at >= #{from} AND l.created_at <= #{to} AND ( (l.target_type = 'ISSUE' AND i.issue_code IS NOT NULL) OR (l.target_type = 'NOTICE' AND n.notice_code IS NOT NULL) OR (l.target_type = 'DOC' AND da.file_code IS NOT NULL) OR (l.target_type NOT IN ('ISSUE','NOTICE','DOC')) ) ORDER BY l.created_at DESC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT i.issue_code AS issueCode, i.project_code AS projectCode, p.project_name AS projectName, i.title AS title, cc.code_name AS statusName, i.progress AS progress, i.due_at AS dueAt, i.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM issues i JOIN projects p ON p.project_code = i.project_code LEFT JOIN status st ON st.status_code = i.status_code LEFT JOIN common_code cc ON cc.code_id = st.code_id AND cc.group_code = 'OB' WHERE p.status = 'OD1' AND i.project_code = #{projectCode} AND i.assignee_code = #{assigneeCode} ORDER BY i.updated_at DESC NULLS LAST, i.issue_code DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{limit}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT i.issue_code AS issueCode, i.project_code AS projectCode, p.project_name AS projectName, i.title AS title, cc.code_name AS statusName, i.progress AS progress, i.due_at AS dueAt, i.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM issues i JOIN projects p ON p.project_code = i.project_code LEFT JOIN status st ON st.status_code = i.status_code LEFT JOIN common_code cc ON cc.code_id = st.code_id AND cc.group_code = 'OB' WHERE p.status = 'OD1' AND i.project_code = #{projectCode} AND i.created_by_code = #{creatorCode} ORDER BY i.updated_at DESC NULLS LAST, i.issue_code DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{limit}

SELECT p.project_code AS projectCode, p.project_name AS projectName FROM projects p WHERE p.status = 'OD1'
AND p.project_code IN
#{pc}
AND 1=0
ORDER BY p.project_name
SELECT p.project_code AS projectCode, p.project_name AS projectName FROM projects p WHERE p.status = 'OD1' ORDER BY p.project_name
